error_signature: You are not authorized to perform this operation
title: Unauthorized error when creating a record in Airtable
symptom: When attempting to create a record in Airtable, the user receives a 403 response stating 'You are not authorized to perform this operation'.
not_this_if: Using an API key with sufficient permissions
root_cause: The error occurs when the personal access token used for the Airtable API lacks the necessary permissions to create records. This can happen if the token was not configured correctly or if the permissions were not granted during its creation.
fix_steps: Check the personal access token settings in Airtable
Ensure the token has permissions for the required operations
Update the token in the WeWeb Airtable data source configuration
agent_instruction: Verify and update the Airtable personal access token permissions in the WeWeb configuration.
